shape_summary: Per-team array of completed game results within an inclusive date range.

teamId.description: MLB Stats API team id (e.g., 147 for NYY)

gameDate.description: Date the game was played in the team's local timezone.

isWin.description: true if the team's runsScored > runsAllowed in the completed game.

runsScored.description: Integer runs scored by the team.

runsAllowed.description: Integer runs allowed by the team.

invariants: Array is sorted by gameDate ascending.
Empty array is valid (team had no games in the window).
All elements have the same teamId as passed to fetchTeamGameResults.
error_behavior: Network failure or non-200 response throws a DataClientError; consumer must handle the thrown error.
